summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; public enum MessagePriority { DEBUG(0), PROGRESS(1), NORMAL(2), USER_ACTION_REQUIRED(3), FINAL(4); private final int level; MessagePriority(int level) { this.level = level; } public int getLevel() { return level; } public static MessagePriority fromLevel(int level) { for (MessagePriority p : values()) { if (p.level == level) return p; } return NORMAL; }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
